mapper.select: SELECT o.* FROM orders o INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo} AND LOWER(u.email) = LOWER(#{email}) LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, original_amount, discount_amount, shipping_fee, total_amount, user_coupon_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, status, shipping_address, payment_method, tracking_number, tracking_carrier_code, tracking_carrier_name, return_tracking_number, return_reason, return_requested_at, return_approved_at, return_rejected_at, return_shipped_at, returned_at, refunded_at, shipped_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{originalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{shippingFee}, #{totalAmount}, #{userCouponId}, #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{status}, #{shippingAddress}, #{paymentMethod}, #{trackingNumber}, #{trackingCarrierCode}, #{trackingCarrierName}, #{returnTrackingNumber}, #{returnReason}, #{returnRequestedAt}, #{returnApprovedAt}, #{returnRejectedAt}, #{returnShippedAt}, #{returnedAt}, #{refundedAt}, #{shippedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, original_amount = #{originalAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, shipping_fee = #{shippingFee}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId}, coupon_id = #{couponId}, coupon_name = #{couponName}, status = #{status}, shipping_address = #{shippingAddress}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}, tracking_carrier_code = #{trackingCarrierCode}, tracking_carrier_name = #{trackingCarrierName}, return_tracking_number = #{returnTrackingNumber}, return_reason = #{returnReason}, return_requested_at = #{returnRequestedAt}, return_approved_at = #{returnApprovedAt}, return_rejected_at = #{returnRejectedAt}, return_shipped_at = #{returnShippedAt}, returned_at = #{returnedAt}, refunded_at = #{refundedAt}, shipped_at = #{shippedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(completed_at, NOW()) ELSE completed_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(completed_at, NOW()) ELSE completed_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED', return_reason = #{reason}, return_requested_at = NOW(), return_rejected_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'COMPLETED', return_rejected_at = NOW(), completed_at = COALESCE(completed_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}

UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}, tracking_carrier_code = #{trackingCarrierCode}, tracking_carrier_name = #{trackingCarrierName}, shipped_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, return_tracking_number = #{returnTrackingNumber}, return_shipped_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'RETURNED', returned_at = NOW(), refunded_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
